$schema_comment: Hooks that automate verification. The harness runs them, not the agent, so they cannot be skipped.

hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then (pnpm run test 2>/dev/null || npm test 2>/dev/null) | tail -3; else echo '[harness] no package.json'; fi
hooks.description: After editing or writing files, run tests and show a short summary.

hooks.command: ./init.sh > /tmp/harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh FAILED — check /tmp/harness_init.log before closing' && cat /tmp/harness_init.log | tail -20)
hooks.description: Before closing the session, force a full verification.
